pi_items.source: Counted the test functions generated by setup_task.sh (7 in test_upc.py and 4 in test_code128.py, totaling 11)
In verifier.py, the task is marked passed if 'score >= 70'

privileged_info_summary: The task project directory is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/barcode_encoder. There are exactly 11 tests generated for the codebase (7 for UPC, 4 for Code 128), contrary to the metadata's claim of 18. The passing score threshold is 70 points out of 100.
